items.headline: This Divvie is the Ultimate 'Pick and Shovel' Play on the EV Boom
items.snippet: That need for lithium benefits top producer Albemarle. ALB controls roughly 15% to 17% of global lithium supply. Now that lithium prices are recovering, ALB is ready to run.

items.headline: Does Albemarle's Premium Valuation Justify Buying the Stock Now?
items.snippet: ALB expects lithium demand to grow at a 10-20% CAGR from 2025 to 2030, with stationary storage a key driver. Global Energy Storage Systems production rose 117% year over year in Q1.

items.headline: Albemarle Likely to Continue Growing Volumes Over the Coming Years, RBC Says
items.snippet: Albemarle is likely to continue growing volumes from Wodgina, Atacama and Kings Mountain. RBC reiterated its outperform rating and boosted its price target to $257 from $253. Lithium supply is expected to remain tight through 2027.
